calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: SD-059/MECH-358 escape-affordance bridge BEHAVIOURAL re-test (scored evidence; successor to V3-EXQ-603i, the pending_retest_after_substrate). Full 4-arm + nav-control discriminative Stage-H run on the 603k+603j-fixed substrate: ARM_BASE_IA_ONLY (bridge OFF) / ARM_RELIEF_BRIDGE / ARM_SAFETY_BRIDGE / ARM_RELIEF_SAFETY_BRIDGE (bridge halves) / ARM_NAV_CONTROL (bridge OFF, spawn-in-reef nav-competence control). ALL arms turn ON the two now-validated substrate fixes: scaffold_train_harm_pathway=True (603k PASS -> clears the 603i PRIMARY nav/survival-competence ceiling; ARM_HARM_ON_NAV G_H 2/3 vs OFF 0/3, harm_eval range 0.133) and escape_use_trained_safety_signal=True + MECH-303 terrain + MECH-304 store + MECH-302 comparator (603j PASS -> the SAFETY half credits non-vacuously via the trained threat-absence signal, mean 0.89 >= 0.5 floor). PRIMARY DV best_bridge_G_H >= 2/3 AND > G_H_BASE. Per-half non-vacuity readiness preconditions retained as a SAFETY NET (each enabled bridge half credits >=2/3 before G_H scored; else self-route substrate_not_ready_requeue, NOT a false weakens).
items.note: Real scored evidence retest (claim_ids=[SD-059, MECH-358], experiment_purpose=evidence, evidence_direction_per_claim emitted), NOT a readiness diagnostic. Base = v3_exq_603i. Both substrate prereqs green (603j safety-half wiring + 603k Stage-H harm-pathway training). Evidence-direction mapping (protects the claims): readiness-not-met -> non_contributory (substrate_not_ready_requeue); PASS -> supports; readiness-met + primary-FAIL + nav-control clears -> weakens (bridge_insufficient_env_survivable); readiness-met + primary-FAIL + nav-control also fails -> non_contributory (navigation_survival_competence_ceiling). validate_experiments --strict + validate_queue + dry-run smoke all PASS (dry scale correctly self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue because the trained safety predictor has not populated at the tiny dry budget; relief half + approach fire). Do NOT edit claims.yaml/governance; evidence folds in via a later /governance cycle once it runs.

items.title: ARC-065 GAP-A R1.b FP-2 matched-entropy action-contrastive behavioural falsifier on the V3-EXQ-649-validated shared-channel stack (REEConfig.candidate_summary_source). Successor to the 569 matched-entropy FP-2 lineage (frontier 569e); supersedes V3-EXQ-569d (pre-649, collapsed-proposer consumption). 3-arm single-variable design, 3 seeds: ARM_0_PROPOSER (candidate_summary_source=proposer, temperature=1.0; pre-649 baseline) / ARM_1_E2WF (candidate_summary_source=e2_world_forward, temperature=1.0; the 649 GAP-A fix, under test) / ARM_2_MATCHED_NOISE (proposer, temperature=2.5; FP-2 matched-entropy noise control). SP-CEM + shared E3-side bias channels (lateral_pfc + mech295) ON; SD-056 online contrastive trained on every arm with the 643a rollout-norm clamp ON. PRIMARY DV = selected_action_class_entropy: R1.b PASS = ARM_1 strictly above BOTH ARM_2_MATCHED_NOISE and ARM_0_PROPOSER per matched seed on >=2/3 seeds, with the ARM_1 consumed-summary spread readiness floor (the 649 statistic, 0.05) and the C1 e2.world_forward prediction-spread floor (0.03) both met.
items.note: Real scored evidence (claim_ids=[ARC-065], experiment_purpose=evidence, evidence_direction_per_claim emitted). behavioral_diversity_isolation:GAP-A R1.b. Evidence-direction mapping protects ARC-065: readiness-below-floor OR C1-fail (SD-056 under-trained / amend not wired) -> non_contributory (substrate_not_ready_requeue, NOT weakens); PASS -> supports; readiness+C1 met but no strict lift above matched-noise -> weakens (r1a_entropy_only_artefact). validate_experiments --strict --paths + dry-run smoke PASS (dry scale correctly self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue; e2 untrained at 2-ep dry budget). Do NOT tag MECH-341 here -- its committed-class GAP-B retest is the concurrent V3-EXQ-660. Do NOT edit claims.yaml/governance; evidence folds in via a later /governance cycle once it runs.

items.title: ARC-062 GAP-B behavioural falsifier (MECH-309/ARC-062) GATED RE-RUN of V3-EXQ-654 on the crf_persist-matured CandidateRuleField substrate (amend ree-v3 9797e84). Single-variable ARM_OFF (use_candidate_rule_field=False, legacy collapsed rule_state) vs ARM_ON (use_candidate_rule_field=True + crf_persist_rules_across_episode_reset=True, MATURED differentiated crf_source) on the matched 649 GAP-A / 643a authority / SD-056 / SP-CEM / MECH-341 stack. THREE fixes vs 654: (1) crf_persist=True so the rule pool matures across episodes and crf_frac_active clears the 0.30 C1c floor (654 cold-started 0.12); (2) a frozen-encoder P1 phase that TRAINS the SD-033a rule_bias_head via outcome-coupled REINFORCE (GAP-D; mirrors v3_exq_598b) so propagation is not vacuous; (3) a propagation non-vacuity precondition (ARM_ON lateral_pfc bias differs from ARM_OFF, else substrate_not_ready_requeue). PRIMARY DV = committed-class entropy; within-class-representative entropy = secondary negative control.
items.note: Real scored evidence (claim_ids=[MECH-309, ARC-062], experiment_purpose=evidence, evidence_direction_per_claim emitted), gated re-run of the C1c-blocked V3-EXQ-654 (confirmed failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-654_2026-06-09). Unblocked by the ARC-063 cross-episode rule-persistence amend (ree-v3 main 9797e84). Phases: P0 (60 ep, e2 SD-056 contrastive warmup; field matures via crf_persist) -> P1 (40 ep, encoder FROZEN, bias-head REINFORCE) -> P2 (60 ep, all frozen, measurement). C1 readiness (class axis exercisable both arms + GAP-A consumed-summary divergence both arms + ARM_ON minted>=2 distinct rules AND crf_frac_active>=0.30 + propagation non-vacuity ARM_ON bias != ARM_OFF) self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue on fail (NOT a weakens). C2 PRIMARY = paired ARM_ON>ARM_OFF committed-class entropy lift >=2/3 seeds. validate_experiments --strict + validate_queue + dry-run smoke all PASS (dry scale correctly self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue). Do NOT weaken MECH-309/ARC-062; evidence folds in via a later /governance cycle once it runs.

items.title: INV-074 crystallization-necessity: task-distribution-shift phase-3 redesign (supersedes 610f)
items.note: IGW-20260609-038 / failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-610f_2026-06-08 user-confirmed route (a). Replaces the noise-only phase-3 with a genuine TASK-DISTRIBUTION SHIFT (SD-054 reef-bipartite layout + hazard_food_attraction=0.8 -> flee-to-reef single dominant optimum conflicting with the phase-0-2 forage policy) so the un-crystallized control suffers catastrophic forgetting (D2 collapse) while the EWC-anchored arm resists (D1). reef_enabled in all phases keeps world_obs_dim=275 constant. Decisive substrate-incapacity fork pre-registered: if D2 still fails on a genuine task-shift -> accept INV-074 substrate_ceiling and STOP the 610 cascade. 5 arms x 3 seeds (42/43/44) x 2500 ep x 200 steps; verified wiring (_assert_fixes_wired) + D3 non-vacuity gate carried from 610f.

items.title: MECH-341 committed-class diversity RETEST on the GAP-A-ready/authority-ready stack using a WITHIN-CLASS-REPRESENTATIVE-DIVERSITY readout (behavioral_diversity_isolation:GAP-B owed action). Supersedes the 614-lineage committed-class-entropy readout (V3-EXQ-614e autopsied non_contributory/substrate_ceiling: committed-class entropy is the WRONG matched axis for a within-class lever; bottleneck relocated to GAP-A candidate pool). All 4 arms arm GAP-A (candidate_summary_source=e2_world_forward; V3-EXQ-649 PASS) + authority (use_modulatory_selection_authority=True gain=0.5; V3-EXQ-643a) + SP-CEM + MECH-341 + SD-056. Sweeps ONLY e3_diversity_stratified_within_class_temperature {None=legacy argmin, 0.5, 1.0, 2.0}. PRIMARY DV (C2) = within_class_rep_cond_entropy = H(rep_signature | committed_class), read off agent.e3._last_selected_trajectory post-first-action signature, expected to RISE with within-class temperature (per-seed paired lift vs ARM_0_LEGACY). Committed-class (across-class) entropy is a SECONDARY negative-control (expected flat; NOT a gate).
items.note: Real scored evidence (claim_ids=[MECH-341], experiment_purpose=evidence, evidence_direction_per_claim emitted). The owed GAP-B action from behavioral_diversity_isolation_plan.md, unblocked by V3-EXQ-649 GAP-A readiness PASS + the 614e autopsy Learning #2 (within-class vs across-class sub-axes must be scored separately). C1 non-vacuity gate (within-class branch fires AND committed class offers >=2 distinct representatives on >=2/3 swept-arm seeds) asserts the SAME within-class-representative axis C2 routes on (representative AVAILABILITY, not a magnitude proxy); C1 FALSE self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue -> non_contributory (protects MECH-341 from a false weakens at degenerate scale -- NOT a weakens). Evidence-direction mapping: C1 fail -> non_contributory; C1+C2 -> supports; C1 + C2-fail (lever operative + pool diverse, no representative-diversity lift) -> weakens. validate_experiments --strict --paths OK (arm_fingerprint per-cell present) + dry-run smoke PASS (dry scale correctly self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue: C1=False at 2-ep P1). Do NOT edit claims.yaml/governance; evidence folds in via a later /governance cycle once it runs.
